snippet.title: Résumé Foireux : MY HERO ACADEMIA (Saison 3 et 4)
snippet.description:
21ème Résumé Foireux sur MHA saison 3 et 4 !
C'est un plaisir pour nous de retrouver nos super-héros adolescents préférés pour les caricaturer plus que jamais ~
ENJOY !

SCRIPT  : Crazybomb, Nessy.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CHAPITRES : 
00:00 Camp d'entraînement
01:15 Sauvetage de Bakugo
03:10 Classement des héros
03:40 Examen du professeur Orca
04:20 Deku rencontre Mirio
05:01 Apparition d'Overhaul
07:36 L''attaque de Gentle Criminal
08:26 Je veux un HEROS !
09:01 Le Magnifique Aizawa~





---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
REMERCIEMENT SPECIAUX :
Armando, Nixop, Athyess et Aifoz pour leurs aides en tant qu'illustrateurs/trices : 
Croquis personnage : https://twitter.com/armanderborio
Décors : https://twitter.com/Nixop
Line et colo' personnage : https://twitter.com/Athyess
Illustration des "mains de femme" : https://twitter.com/Aifo_zu
​
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

​
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Apollo : Night Eye
Artekyon : Gentle Criminal, Orca

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #hammerjam #seasonofupgrades

en.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
en.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

snippet.title: Vivre avec des (excellents) youtubeurs : Erika et Tiffany répondent à tout
snippet.description:
Comment Tiffany et Erika, nos tendres épouses, vivent cette vie de folie à nos côtés ? Quel est leur rapport à Youtube et au succès ? Est-ce qu'elles subissent la pression monumentale liée à notre carrière ? Elles répondent aux questions des internautes sans langue de bois et en faisant de la réflexologie plantaire. 
La vidéo avec le président vous vous doutez que ça prend max de temps à se mettre en place hein, mais ça avance...

La version longue de cette table Ovale gratuitement en exclusivité sur Spotify : https://spoti.fi/3vUaPbh
Merci à Spotify qui n'est pas un sponsor mais notre partenaire de diffusion, et avec qui nous sommes en train de devenir copains comme cochons.

Insta de Tiffany : https://www.instagram.com/tiffanycoscas/
Insta d'Erika : https://www.instagram.com/erikafleuryofficiel/

#tableovale    #versionlonguesurspotify

Réalisateur : Florent Sabatier 
Directeur photo/OPV : Scotty Simper
OPV : Thibault Arbre - Emmanuel Guimier
Coordinateur technique : Rémi Serrano
Chef OPS : Théo Thérès 
Régisseur général : Sébastien Boullard 

Merci à Franck Gervaise pour le montage du logo !

Producteurs : Julien Allard - Anne Duval
Directrice de production : Camille Selosse
Chargée de production : Elise Porcher
Assistant de production : Arthur Miller
Administratrice de production : Odile Rouyer
Assistant administrateur de production : Benjamin Louchart 

Monteur : Jérôme Fillette 
Graphiste / Vignette : Antoine Behaeghel / Moodmaker

0:00 intro
3:58 la rencontre des filles
8:30 la rencontre entre Erika et Raf
15:19 comment qu'c'est de vivre avec nous ?
26:00 conjuguer vie pro et vie perso
30:24 on accorde trop de temps à Youtube ?
41:21 est-ce qu'elles regardent toutes nos vidéos ?
55:49 a-t-on des craintes pour l'avenir de nos enfants ?
58:34 l'implication de nos femmes dans notre boulot ?

PS : Morgan aurait dû gagner aux points.

snippet.title: We Moved Across The Country
snippet.description:
You can check out our new live streaming channel here! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiiY0MsUgNihfAZ2ZgC19lg

Hello friends and welcome to another video! So, late last year we decided to take the plunge and move across the country for a fresh start in a new place. After doing some serious decluttering, we packed up our house, grabbed our cat, and hit the road (and vlogged our whole cross-country road trip in our minivan!) It's been a couple of months and we are finally set up enough to dive back into making videos, so here is our moving vlog! Hopefully you guys enjoy it, and thank you for being so patient with us while we figure all of this out. 

Also, sorry about any smudginess of the windshield! It was tough to keep clean on our drive, but I know sometimes it can look gross, so sorry about that! Lol

This video is NOT sponsored!!

You can check out my Instagram here! https://www.instagram.com/safiyany/​

MUSIC
Via AudioNetwork

snippet.title: Kardeşlerim 6. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Kardeşlerim 7. Bölüm 2. Fragmanı:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HJoa7pVecBw
Asiye ve Doruk'tan ''Rüya'' düeti!🎤- Kardeşlerim 5. Bölüm:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4vEEHPrSN1Q
Asiye ve Doruk'tan ''Bile Bile'' düeti 🎤- Kardeşlerim 5. Bölüm:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4QN3JIU9bJI 

6.Bölüm Özeti: 
“Sizin servetinizde bizim gözyaşımız var!”
Melisa’nın itirafı Kadir’i büyük açmaza sokar. Melisa’nın Kadir’e hazırladığı sürpriz, Kadir’i Ömer’e karşı zor duruma düşürür.  Kardeşlerin yaşadığı yaşam mücadelesi karşısında Şengül’ün merhametsizliği Orhan’ı iyice çileden çıkarır. Suzan’dan hiç beklemediği bir şey öğrenen Akif, büyük panik yaşar ve durumu idare etmekte zorlanır. Suzan’ı oyalamaya çalışırken işler sarpa sarar ve Suzan artık gemileri yakmaya karar verir. Akif ve Nebahat karşı karşıya gelirler. Nebahat, Kadir’i ve kardeşlerini kullanarak öyle bir hamle yapar ki bütün gerçekler gün yüzüne çıkmaz üzeredir.

Kardeşlerim kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halit Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

atv resmi YouTube kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/2Pddn3r

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halit Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

snippet.title: SCH - Loup Noir | A COLORS SHOW
snippet.description:
French rapper Julien Schwarzer aka @SCH shares a performance of cinematic new song "Loup Noir"

New COLORS Apparel out now: https://shop.colorsxstudios.com

Follow
▶ Stream: https://colors.lnk.to/allshowscxs
▶ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/schmathafack
▶ Instagram: https://instagram.com/sch
—
Follow COLORS:
▶ COLORS Apparel: https://colors.lnk.to/shopcxs
▶ On Socials: https://lnk.to/socials
▶ On Spotify: https://colors.lnk.to/Spotify
▶ On Apple Music: https://colors.lnk.to/applemusic
▶ On the Web: https://colorsxstudios.com

COLORSXSTUDIOS is a unique aesthetic music platform showcasing exceptional talent from around the globe. COLORS focuses on the most distinctive new artists and original sounds in an increasingly fragmented and saturated scene. All COLORS shows seek to provide clear, minimalistic stage that shines a spotlight on the artists, giving them the opportunity to present their music without distraction.

LOUP NOIR 
LYRICS

Les sourires et les faux semblants 
Et quelques gouttes ont suffit 
A l’élixir pour être mortel 
Que des caisses noires dans le cortège 
Des 3-pièces et des longs impers qui cachent les guitares 
Des reufs  au mitard 
Les faits divers en hiver 
J’ai fait 100 000 avant le mis-per  

J’m’entraîne à sourire devant la glace 
J’m’entraîne à souffrir sans remède 
Le petite maison est en ruine 
Quand la faim pense, 
le coeur est en grève 
La vie c’est mener les bons choix 
L’image vient sans même une esquisse 
Dans le dos les schlass traversent la redskins
La trahison des gens qu’on estime 
J’ai pas vu père fermer les paupières 
Tête dans le guidon c’était le frigo 
Une chienne de vie à se lever aux aurores 
J’aurai jamais su comment faire 
J’aurai jamais su comment perdre 
Avec la haine de ceux qu’on enferme  

Et quand les yeux se ferment et que tout est noir 
Quand les mots se perdent 
Tu veux  tuer un homme 
Prend du Sky et des faux espoirs 
Et quand les mômes se perdent 
Dans les sinueux couloirs des enfers 
On sera de retour 2 minutes avant 
Que les revolvers leur jouent du tonnerre 
L’orage est parti où est le soleil 
Mon deuil n’est pas fait où est mon sommeil 

J’parle de vraies choses qu’on vit ici 
De vrais flingues qu’on a tenu
D’un vrai sang qui s’est versé
De la seule femme qui m’a bercé 
De vrais potes qu’on a perdus 

Des pensées noires et des nuits blanches 
Des armes des enfants terribles 
Le béton le bruit du ciment 
Là où on veut pas finir intérim 
Des gens m’ont trahi j’ai la nausée 
J’dépose un flingue et quelques roses 
Sur le verso d’un livre usé 
Énumérer ce que j’y ai laissé 
Prendre un maximum pour papa 
Comme si j’allais le faire renaître 
D’entre les morts comme un Dieu grec 
Tous les bleus que j’ai autour du coeur 
Tous ces billets froissés dans mon sac 
Trop jeune pour embrasser le plomb 
Mais trop jeune pour vivre tout ça 
Des borsalino dans la nuit 
Des portes flingues tournent dans la ville 
Du sang à éponger dans la cuisine 
Des billets qui flottent dans la piscine 
Little Italy Corleone sous Michael 
Marie Curie dans la compteuse
Là où le ventre est le prompteur 

La faim justifie la violence 
Là où la violence est la réponse 
Là où la violence est le moteur 
Là où la violence est le docteur 
Vivons cachés vivons gantés 
faisons le tour du monde entier 
Avant qu’une balle nous arrête 
J.V.L.I.V.S

#colors #SCH #loupnoir

snippet.title: Ta Joela krijgt kortsluiting in Switch Up | SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE ft. Bassistent
snippet.description:
ABONNEER op Supergaande als je altijd op de hoogte wilt blijven!
https://Supergaande.lnk.to/abonneer

Bekijk meer van SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ShM8bOZM2Uk&list=PLlxjiU7Uh8S7BPPKCIFW2qO1wr4tI_KzJ

In Supergaande Freestyle strijden Qucee, Nesim, Ta Joela en een gast om wie het creatiefste is met bars. De groep spelen om de kroon in twee rondes: Switch Up en Freestyle.

In Switch Up wordt er een kaart gepakt waarop de lyrics staan van een bekend nummer. Fraasie draait een beat waarop het nummer gebracht moet worden. De rest van de groep moet vervolgens raden om welke track het gaat.

In de final round gaat de groep in Freestyle op basis van een woord zolang mogelijk proberen rappen. De eerste die choked, is eruit.

-----------

Esti o bucata cazuta din rai,

Gura ta dulce ispita mi-e iar.
Ochii diamante,
Tu ma ghidezi in noapte.

Ia-ma-n brate flamande,
Lipeste ma de inima ta.
Fericire-n secunde,
Opreste timpul, nu mai pleca.

Cand nori pe cerul vietii se aduna, hoooo,
Ma las in grija ta,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.
Si-n noptile reci cu luna plina, heeei, 
Ma-mbraci cu dragostea,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Am lasat in urma noastra orasul gol.
Ne-am inchis in lumea noastra in dormitor,

Tu esti noaptea mea albastra,
Esti tot ce am mai bun.

snippet.title: 5 minutes from death : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I knew that what I’d been looking for, I hadn’t found yet. But what I had been looking for was not in the form of a drug.”
Demi and her closest confidants give a firsthand account of the aftermath of the overdose as she wakes up in the hospital after being minutes away from death.

Episode 3 available March 30 @ 12p PT

Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

de.title: Dem Tode nah : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
"Ich wusste, ich hatte noch nicht gefunden, wonach ich suchte. Aber ich suchte nicht nach Drogen."

Demi und ihre engsten Vertrauten erzählen aus erster Hand von der Zeit nach der Überdosis, als sie im Krankenhaus aufwachte, nachdem sie dem Tod knapp entronnen war.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Anlaufstelle bei sexueller Gewalt
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

es-419.title: A 5 minutos de la muerte : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Sabía que lo que estaba buscando no lo había encontrado todavía. Pero lo que estaba buscando no era una droga".
Demi y sus seres queridos relatan en primera persona las secuelas de la sobredosis cuando se despierta en el hospital tras haber estado a minutos de la muerte.

Recursos:

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Línea directa nacional para agresiones sexuales
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

id.title: 5 Menit dari Kematian : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku sudah mengetahui apa yang aku cari selama ini, tetapi aku belum menemukannya. Namun, hal yang kucari selama ini bukan dalam bentuk obat.”

Demi dan orang kepercayaan terdekatnya menceritakan secara langsung akibat dari peristiwa overdesis ketika dia bangun di rumah sakit setelah beberapa menit nyaris mati.

Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Saluran siaga Serangan Seksual Nasional
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

ko.title: 죽기 5분 전 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
“제가 찾던 걸 아직 찾지 못했다는 걸 알았어요. 하지만 제가 찾던 건 약물이 아니었죠"
데미와 가장 가까운 사람들이 생사를 가른 몇 분 후 데미가 병원에서 깨어나고 약물 복용에 따른 결과를 직접 본 일을 털어놓는다.

도움받을 곳:

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
전국 성폭력 핫라인
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

fr.title: À 5 minutes de la mort : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
“Je savais que je n'avais pas encore trouvé ce que je cherchais. Mais la réponse n'était pas dans la drogue." 


Demi et ses plus proches confidents font le compte-rendu des conséquences de l'overdose à son réveil à l'hôpital, après être passée à quelques minutes de la mort.

Ressources :
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Hotline National Sexual Assault
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.

pt-BR.title: a 5 minutos da morte  : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Sabia que ainda não havia encontrado o que buscava. Mas o que eu buscava, não era em formato de drogas.”
Demi e seus confidentes mais íntimos contam em primeira mão as consequências da overdose enquanto ela acorda no hospital, após quase morrer.

Recursos:
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I crossed a line I’d never crossed in addiction.” 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders

ko.title: 통제를 잃다 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:

대담한 다큐멘터리 시리즈 1편에서, 데미 로바토와 가족, 친구들은 데미가 목숨을 잃을 뻔한 약물 과다 복용에 이르기까지의 상황에 관해 처음으로 솔직하게 털어놓는다.

영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기

fr.title: La perte de contrôle : Dancing with the Devil

snippet.title: Plopsaland wacht nog even om samen te werken met CEMI
snippet.description:
De attractie van TikTok-sterren Céline en Michiel in Plopsaland De Panne komt er toch niet meteen! Studio 100 was met verschillende influencers aan het praten om samen projecten in het pretpark uit te werken, zoals de zweefmolen van CEMI. Vorige week maakte Studio 100 bekend dat de ROX-Flyer verandert in de CEMI-Flyer. Maar dat vond niet iedereen een goed idee. Op het nieuws kwamen heel wat felle reacties. 

👍 Vind je onze video's leuk? Abonneer je dan op ons kanaal en laat een comment achter. Die lezen we met veel plezier!
💻 Surf naar https://www.ketnet.be/karrewiet voor nog meer leuke video’s en de volledige Karrewiet uitzendingen.
📱 Of download de gratis Ketnet-app.
📷 Volg Karrewiet op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/karrewietketnet.

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“You really find out who’s there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.”
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato’s new song, “Dancing With The Devil”: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

ko.title: 힘 되찾기 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"모든 게 잘못되면 누가 진정한 친구인지 알게 돼요"
데미는 재활 시설에 가서 회복의 여정을 시작하지만, 걸림돌을 만난다. 약물 과다 복용 이후 처음으로 무대 위로 돌아온 데미는 자신의 인생에서 균형을 찾아야 한다.

도움받을 곳:

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 

전국 성폭력 핫라인
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

정신 건강 교육과 자원은 Hope For The Day의 hftd.org에서 확인하세요.

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

de.title: Die Kontrolle zurückgewinnen : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
“Man erkennt wirklich, wer zu einem steht, wenn einem die Welt unter den Füßen wegbricht.“
Demi macht einen Entzug und beginnt ihren Genesungsweg, allerdings mit Hindernissen. Als sie zum ersten Mal nach ihrer Überdosis wieder auf der Bühne steht, muss sie Balance in ihrem Leben finden.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Anlaufstelle bei sexueller Gewalt
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Für Informationen und Quellen zu psychischer Gesundheit besuchen Sie Hope for the Day auf hftd.org

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

pt-BR.title: retomando o controle : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Você só descobre com quem pode contar quando você fica sem chão.”
Demi entra na clínica de recuperação e começa seu tratamento, enfrentando alguns problemas no caminho. Ao voltar aos palcos pela primeira vez após a overdose, ela precisa encontrar equilíbrio em sua vida.”

Recursos:
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

fr.title: Reprendre le contrôle : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"On découvre ceux qui sont là pour nous quand le monde se dérobe sous nos pieds."

Demi va en cure de désintoxication et emprunte la voie de la guérison, non sans obstacles. Alors qu'elle s'apprête à retrouver la scène pour la première fois après son overdose, elle doit trouver un équilibre dans sa vie.

Ressources :
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Hotline National Sexual Assault
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
  
Pour en savoir plus sur la santé mentale, rendez-vous sur Hope for the Day à hftd.org.
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.

en.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
“You really find out who’s there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.”
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato’s new song, “Dancing With The Devil”: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

es-419.title: retomando el control : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Descubres realmente con quién puedes contar cuando el mundo se te cae encima".
Demi va a rehabilitación y comienza a recuperarse, pero se encuentra con obstáculos en el camino. Al volver a los escenarios por primera vez desde su sobredosis, necesita encontrar el equilibrio en su vida.
Recursos:

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Línea directa nacional para agresiones sexuales
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Para obtener información y recursos sobre salud mental, visita Hope for the Day en hftd.org

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

id.title: Meraih Kekuatan Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Kau akan benar-benar mengetahui siapa yang berada di sisimu ketika kehidupanmu hancur berantakan.”
Demi menjalani rehabilitasi dan memulai perjalanannya untuk pemulihan, tetapi dengan berbagai rintangan. Di saat dia kembali naik panggung untuk pertama kali sejak dirinya overdosis, dia perlu menemukan keseimbangan di dalam hidupnya.
Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Saluran siaga Serangan Seksual Nasional
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Untuk pendidikan kesehatan mental dan sumber kunjungi Hope for the Day di hftd.org

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

snippet.title: Y'a quoi à l'INTÉRIEUR de ces 8 BALLES ? 🎳
snippet.description:
Derrière ces balles innocentes se cachent des secrets ; à l'intérieur, des technologies, de la chimie et des dangers que vous ne soupçonnez même pas. Alors sortez vos ciseaux, sortez vos marteau, aujourd’hui on va les ouvrir : Balles de Golf, Balles de Baseball, Boules de Bowling, Boules de Pétanque, Balles de Ping-Pong, Boules de Billard, Ballons de Foot, Ballons de Basket

snippet.title: Des retrouvailles inespérées ! - Ça commence aujourd'hui
snippet.description:
Retrouvez les intégrales de l’émission sur FranceTV : https://www.france.tv/france-2/ca-commence-aujourd-hui/ 
 
Après des années sans nouvelles, ils se retrouvent de nouveau sur le plateau de Ça commence aujourd’hui. 

« Des retrouvailles inespérées ! » diffusée le 26/03/2021 à 13h50 sur France 2.
 
Tous les jours, Faustine Bollaert accueille sur le plateau de « Ça commence aujourd'hui » des hommes et des femmes qui évoquent des événements marquants de leur existence.

Son livre Histoire de la conquête spatiale : 
▹ https://www.amazon.fr/Histoire-Conquete-Spatiale-ans-dApollo-dp-2807320759/dp/2807320759/ref=dp_ob_image_bk

Chargée de production : Estelle Tonnet
Assistante de production : Juliette Rivierre
Régisseur : Alexandre Bataille & Yanis Fernane
Chef opérateur : Guillaume Quincy
Assistant caméra : Josselin Étienne
Chef électro : Gaëtan Mercier
Make Up : Haïfa Baccour
Photographe de plateau : Rayan Hamida

---------------
PAROLES

Une ballade à deux, y a que toi et moi tu sais
Une ballade à deux, rentre pas dans leur jeu, c'est que toi et moi tu sais
x2
Aujourd'hui je ne vois que toi, j'ai souvent été aveuglé
Tu es mon nouveau départ, je serai ta ligne d'arrivée,
Compte sur moi je vais pas les calculer
Main dans la main ils comprennent pas mais nous on sait

Une ballade à deux, y a que toi et moi tu sais
Une ballade à deux, rentre pas dans leur jeu, c'est que toi et moi tu sais
Une ballade à deux, pas besoin de leur feu vert, pour être avec toi tu sais
Une ballade à deux, c'est pas dans leur code, ouais mais bon c'est pas le sujet

Demain nouveau jour, demain je m'habillerai en tous Louis
Obstacles sur la route, mais j'irais tout droit à la mairie
Encore une ballade, une salade qui a rendu notre couple solide
Notre histoire est banale, ces malades nous critiquent mais guettent nos storys
Qui aurait pu miser, qui aurait pu parier,
Chaque fois c'est pareil
Ils ne font que parler, ne veulent que nous séparer
Pas ça pour la gloire, on fait pas ça pour la fame
Toi et moi c'est plus que la même, je sais qu'on s'aime plus que la veille
Parce que tu sais

Une ballade à deux, y a que toi et moi tu sais
Une ballade à deux, rentre pas dans leur jeu, c'est que toi et moi tu sais
Une ballade à deux, pas besoin de leur feu vert, pour être avec toi tu sais
Une ballade à deux, c'est pas dans leur code, ouais mais bon c'est pas le sujet

Je veux pas que ça se finisse, pas que ça se finisse là
C'est vrai que pour être heureux faut vivre dans l'anonymat
Je veux pas que ça se finisse, pas que ça se finisse là
On sait pas où on va, qu'importe tant que c'est avec toi.

snippet.title: MARIE S'INFILTRE À DUBAÏ - EP1 : LES INFLUENCEURS (ENGLISH SUB)
snippet.description:
Les influenceurs français expatriés à Dubaï : des stars millionnaires qui ont quitté la France et surtout ses impôts, en laissant derrière-eux un nuage de codes promo. Des stars de la réalité créés de toutes pièces par nos besoins les plus vils : se vider le cerveau dans l’obscénité d'une bêtise qui fascine, qui fait rire, qui divertit totalement. Certains les adulent, d’autres les détestent, mais pourtant, nous les regardons vivre, nous connaissons le nom de leurs enfants, la marque de leurs vêtement, la couleur de leur voiture.

-30% sur toutes les prochaines videos gratuites avec le code MARIESINFILTREDUBAI !

snippet.title: Starship | SN11 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Tuesday, March 30, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 11 (SN11) – our fourth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN11 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN11 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN11’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s fourth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

snippet.title: La Punchline
snippet.description:
Brooklyn, 1973. Sergio assiste à l'assassinat de son père. Il décide de se venger avec style, mais la tâche est loin d'être simple quand on est con comme un mur. 

« La Punchline » Écrit par Léopold Lemarchand 

CASTING 

Arno Chevrier 
Régis Royer 
Léopold Lemarchand 
Maxence Lapérouse 
Lucas Studio

ÉQUIPE TECHNIQUE 

Production : Sick Pilot Company 
Directeur de production : Maxime Pontois 
Chargé de production : Matthieu Guyot 
Réalisateur : Amaury Dequé 
Chef OPV : Romain Prouveur 
1ère assistant caméra : Florent Stramboli 
Cadreur Steadicam : Olivier Gastellou 
Chef OPS : Corentin Meyrieux 
Mixage son : Florent Simon 
Maquillage et effets spéciaux : Sidney Billon 
Montage : Amaury Dequé et Eliott Doyle 
Etalonneur : Augustin Bayle 
Miniature : Adem Yildirim 

MUSIQUES 
 
Hauntings - Ray Davies
Approaching Menace - Patrick Hawes
La Donna E Mobile - Verdi, Julian Gallant, David Tobin, Jeff Meegan
Time Trial - Amie Doherty
Allegretto - Beethoven, David Tobin, Jeff Meegan, Julian Gallant, Rob Kelly
Look Out - Michael Levine

REMERCIEMENTS

Un gigantesque merci à l’équipe du The Hoxton, Paris de nous avoir ouvert les portes du Jacques’Bar, pour tourner ce sketch. Le lieu est magnifique et le personnel incroyablement gentil, vous pouvez foncer.

snippet.title: This is why we can't have nice things
snippet.description:
This video is about stuff: light bulbs, printers, phones and why they aren't better. Go to https://NordVPN.com/veritasium and use code VERITASIUM to get a 2-year plan plus 1 additional month with a huge discount. It’s risk free with Nord’s 30 day money-back guarantee!

References:
The Man in the White Suit — https://ve42.co/Suit

London, B. (1932). Ending the depression through planned obsolescence. — https://ve42.co/London32

Slade, G. (2009). Made to break: Technology and obsolescence in America. Harvard University Press — https://ve42.co/madetobreak

Krajewski, M. (2014). The great lightbulb conspiracy. IEEE spectrum, 51(10), 56-61. — https://ve42.co/Phoebus

snippet.title: Martien en Maxime BESPIONEREN ERICA op haar DATE! | Chateau Meiland
snippet.description:
Bekijk alle afleveringen op de website: httpsa://bit.ly/2EPg6rz

ABONNEER op SBS6 voor meer video's: http://bit.ly/2qiTx8c.  
BEKIJK OOK eens de playlist van Chateau Meiland: https://bit.ly/2Q8QKsV

VOLG SBS6 op social media! 
Facebook | http://bit.ly/2qngtRA 
Instagram | sbs6nl
TikTok | sbs6nl

OVER Chateau Meiland
Martien, Erica en Maxime hebben het Franse chateau-leven verplaatst naar het dorpje Hengelo in de Achterhoek. Maar de Nederlandse regelzucht gaat slecht samen met de chaos van de familie Meiland. Officieel mag in de boerderij met bijgebouwen slechts één huishouden ingeschreven staan. Dus het moderne living-together-apart idee met voor iedereen een eigen woning, past niet in het stijve bestemmingsplan. En daar had even niemand op gerekend. De laatste dozen zijn nog niet eens uitgepakt, de verf is nog niet droog en de nieuwe keuken voor Maxime wordt net geplaatst. Wat nu? Strijden tegen ambtenaren, hopen dat het vanzelf goed komt of van de nood een deugd maken?

snippet.title: Ramo - 37.Bölüm (Sistem)
snippet.description:
Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için Ramo kanalına katılın: https://bit.ly/34eUNwx​​

Ramo, kaybolan paraların peşinde hiç bilmediği bir kasabaya ulaşır. Kaptan, paraların bulunması için Ramo’ya 24 saat süre verir. Aksi halde kasabayı yerle bir edecektir. Bir yandan masum insanları Kaptan’ın şerrinden korumaya çalışan Ramo, diğer yandan kendisine kimin ihanet ettiğini araştırmaya başlar.

Şerif ise Serdengeçtilerin sistemini çözüp onları yok etmeye kararlıdır. Bu uğurda yeni bir plan yapan Şerif, amacına bir adım daha yaklaştığını düşünüyordur. Diğer yandan Sibel, başını belaya sokmasına rağmen Doğu’nun annesini aramaya devam eder. İpuçları Sibel’i hiç beklemediği bir yere çıkarır. Olan biteni öğrenen Ramo bile bu son durum karşısında ne yapacağını bilemez.

Ramo Resmi Hesapları: 
https://www.instagram.com/ramo_dizisi/​​
https://twitter.com/ramodizisi​​
https://www.facebook.com/ramodizisi​​

Ramo YouTube Kanalına Abone Ol → https://bit.ly/37j0746​​

#Ramo​​ #MuratYıldırım​​ #EsraBilgiç​​ #BKM​​ #ShowTV​​ #Dizi​​ #RamBel​

snippet.title: Tuğçe Kandemir - Ah Ellerim Kırılaydı
snippet.description:
'' Ah Ellerim Kırılaydı '' tüm dijital platformlarda!

Söz - Müzik: Tuğçe Kandemir
Düzenleme: Özkan Meydan, Alican Özbuğutu
Mix Mastering: Dijital Meydan
Solo Keman: Kadir Okyay
Grup Keman: İstanbul Strings
Yönetmen: Celal Canik, Soner Karakuş
Backstage: Şeref Kaner Dönder
Prodüksiyon: RepoFilm
Color: Ercan Küçük (ThePostBrothers)

'' Ah Ellerim Kırılaydı '' sözleri ile;

Güzeldi gördüm gözleri.
Uzaktan uzaktan .
Haberim yoktu benim böyle bi tuzaktan. 
Geçtim günahını ,
Yazdım sabahlara kadar .
Gezdik sokakları ,
Güneşler doğana kadar .
Bilemedim ayrılırsın .
Başkasına katlanırsın.
Bi özler kahrolursun.
Olmadı .
Unutupta gizlice ,
Elim gider telefona.
Yıllar geçti aradan ,
Arasam mı bu gece ? 

Ah !ellerim kırılaydı ...
O numara ben unutaydım .
Gözlerini kurutaydım.
Seni öyle arasaydım.
Ben seni nereden aradım?
O sesini duydum.
Durdum durdum.
Şeytana uydum.

Bilemedim ayrılırsın .
Başkasına katlanırsın.
Bi özler kahrolursun.
Olmadı .
Unutupta gizlice ,
Elim gider telefona.
Yıllar geçti aradan ,
Arasam mı bu gece ? 

Ah !ellerim kırılaydı ...
O numara ben unutaydım .
Gözlerini kurutaydım.
Seni öyle arasaydım.
Ben seni nereden aradım?
O sesini duydum.
Durdum durdum.
Şeytana uydum.

Bu kanaldaki tüm eserlerin telif hakları MEDIADEVY tarafından korunmakta olup, tekrar yükleme, remix gibi hiç bir çalışmada kullanılmasına izin verilmemektedir.

#TuğçeKandemir #AhEllerimKırılaydı

#TuğçeKandemir #AhEllerimKırılaydı

snippet.title: Robert de Hoog (Tatta Mocro Maffia) - Bij Andy in de auto! (English subtitles)
snippet.description:
Robert de Hoog bij Andy in de auto! Acteur die al een tijdje meeloopt en al tientallen rollen heeft gespeeld. Won een Gouden Kalf voor Beste Acteur, heeft gewerkt met Steven Spielberg en had de hoofdrol in de eerste Nederlandstalige 3D-film Nova Zembla. Doet het nu fantastisch met zijn rol als Tatta in de hitserie Mocro Maffia. Geweldige acteur en relaxte gozer! Mooi om deze Topper in de auto te hebben! 

Word lid van dit kanaal en krijg toegang tot speciale voordelen:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvFmO93LlI2K21nZOUwjwfA/join

Volg me op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/andyvandermeijde7/

Bij Andy in de auto is vanaf nu ook te beluisteren als Podcast!
https://open.spotify.com/show/2rb6gsVY2ujkO3wrxuY7UP?si=breKCFcrTQOqBGXwVVychA

Produced by Eye Legacy

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

snippet.title: Full Replay: Starship SN11 test flight from a foggy Boca Chica, Texas
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN11 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible in the morning local time on Tuesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

This original content is copyrighted to NASASpaceflight (NASASpaceflight.com) and is not to be reused in any form without explicit permission.

Updates: https://forum.nasaspaceflight.com/index.php?topic=53270.220

snippet.title: Tayc - Le Temps (Clip Officiel)
snippet.description:
Écoutez "Le Temps", nouvel extrait de l'album Fleur Froide (Donum Novae), maintenant disponible sur toutes les plateformes de streaming : https://tayc.s-ib.link/letemps

S'abonner à la chaîne 👉 http://bit.ly/TaycYTB

Réalisateur : Tayc et Kévin Still
Compositeur : Nyadjiko
Enregistré et mixé par : DJ Nass212

Directrice de production : Claire Montandrau
Assistants de production : Eva Fitoussi & Hitch
Chef opérateur : Stéphane Martins
Assistant caméra : Alexis Gouverneur
Chef électro : Tristan Charles
Electro : Lucas Martins
Steadicamer : Calvin Tournié
Droneur : Jean-Paul Pyree
Vfx Paolo : Didier
Etalonneur : Eudes Quittelier
Chef décorateur : Estelle El Mogharbel
Assistante décoration : Maud Vidal Foulon
Cuisinière : willow.cookk
Make-up artists : Julia Mensah, Joyce CAD & Sonia Sfaxi
Styliste : Youth SMHR
Assistante styliste : Laurinne Martocchia
Fixeur : Nicolas Gannaz
Directrice de casting : Aurélie Rabe
Régisseur : Moussa Assoumani
Chauffeurs van : Revaz Chikobava & Tony Salazar
Making of : Ambre
Graphiste : Satis
Management & coordination : Rivelino
Figuration : Aguilar Rodriguez Kaneza, Pearla Perlson & Camille Lambese

Remerciements  :
Bosse Management  /  Studios Moov Art
Play two
H24 music

-------------------------------
Contact avec Tayc :
➡ https://www.instagram.com/taycofficiel
➡ https://www.facebook.com/TaycAlone
➡ https://www.snapchat.com/add/tay.kee
➡ https://twitter.com/TaycOfficiel
➡ https://www.tiktok.com/@tayctok

Contact management : amos@bossemanagement.com

Paroles : 

Iiiiih
Iiiihhhh
Oohohoh
Menedo x7
Mami ouh mami x7

Refrain :
Oh le temps, le temps m’a réparé
Plus rien n’est comme avant 
Quelqu’un m’a déjà soigné
Ooh le vent, le vent a bien tourné
Ne gaspille pas mon temps
Une autre a su me soigner  

Toi la tu disparais sans laisser un mot 
T’as préféré fuir comme un enfant, partir sans te retourner
J’tai prêté mon coeur et tu lui as donné ton dos 
Toi tu m’as fais gaspiller mon temps, 
Tu n’ma pas laisser parler
Aahhhiiiii
Et maintenant, tu reviens, et comme avant, 
tu espère retrouver celui qui t’as aimé, celui avec qui t’as joué
Et maintenant, maintenant c’est toi qui veut parler
Et toute tes meilleures phrases tu veux les caler
Ne gaspille pas mon temps 

Refrain :
Oh le temps, le temps m’a réparé
Plus rien n’est comme avant 
Quelqu’un m’a déjà soigné
Ooh le vent, le vent a bien tourné
Ne gaspille pas mon temps
Une autre a su me soigner  

Ne me fais pas croire que j’nai pas fais c’quil faut
Moi je t’ai fais passer avant tout
J’en ai perdu la raison
Sans aucun remords toi t’as tout jeté à l’eau
J’étais devenu accro à ton goût
Le goût de ton poison.
Mais maintenant, moi ça va, avec toi
J’avais comme l’impression de devoir supplier
Pour quelque chose que tu me dois non
Maintenant toi tu veux enfin m’entendre
On s’est arrêté tu veux reprendre

Refrain : 
Oh le temps, le temps m’a réparé
Plus rien n’est comme avant 
Quelqu’un m’a déjà soigné
Ooh le vent, le vent a bien tourné
Ne gaspille pas mon temps
Une autre a su me soigner

Menedo x7
Mami ouh mami x7

#Tayc #LeTemps #FleurFroide

snippet.title: I Jumped the World’s Most Extreme Skydive (Near Death Experience)
snippet.description:
Seek Discomfort Moonshot Collection is out today, so go to https://www.seekdiscomfort.com to check it out!

Special thanks to:
- Sean MacCormac @Seanmaccormac 
- Jon Devore @jondevore 
- Romulo da Rocha Rangel Antunes @r3adventure
- Josh Hall
- Skydive Elsinore @skydiveelsinore
- Halo day cinematography by @moliverallen

✈ Book an Adventure: https://travel.yestheory.com/

JOIN OUR COMMUNITY
⁺ Yes Theory Plus: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTd7KzdwnFE3lm6LCfYDmUQ
📝 Follow Matt’s Newsletter: http://yestheory.com/newsletter/
📸 Instagram -  https://www.instagram.com/yestheory/
🐦 Twitter - https://twitter.com/yestheory
🎬  Facebook- https://www.facebook.com/yestheory/

☮️ If you want to join the Yes Fam Facebook group which is 100,000+ of our most engaged and badass community members, you can apply here: 
https://www.facebook.com/groups/yesfam/

🎥 HOW WE MAKE OUR VIDEOS

🎵 Where we find our music:
1- Epidemic Sound. Amazing royalty free music for YouTube. Free 30 day trial here: http://share.epidemicsound.com/wFFbr​

snippet.title: Laurie: “Alsof ze UIT ELKAAR GETROKKEN wordt in die machine” | Hooligirls: Gyrospace
snippet.description:
De Hooligirls zijn terug met een splinternieuwe look en een wel héle gewilde prijs. Enthousiast beginnen ze aan de eerste challenge van het nieuwe seizoen, maar de moed zakt ze al snel in de schoenen wanneer ze met een maag vol appelmoes op de meest onmogelijke manier een geheugenspelletje moeten spelen… 

Welke hooligirl weet haar kots en tranen door te slikken en wie gaat naar huis met de eerste winst van het seizoen? 

Marie Louise, Jane en Laurie dagen elkaar uit in Hooligirls en doen daarin ALLES wat jij nooit zou durven. Elke week strijden de dames in een nieuwe challenge. Wie gaat er met de winst vandoor?

Abonneer je op ons kanaal: https://www.youtube.com/c/SpikeNederland?sub_confirmation=1 

Spike is op TV te zien op: 
KPN, Telfort, XS4ALL #13
Ziggo #16 
T-Mobile Thuis #19

Volg ons ook op: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/spiketvnl 
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/spiketvnl
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/spiketvnl
Website: http://www.spiketv.nl

#Spike #Hooligirls

snippet.title: CR7 répond à la polémique, l'échange Mbappé-Martial, la prédiction de Zlatan | Les Actus du jour
snippet.description:
Aujourd’hui, Oh My Goal revient sur le pétage de câble de Cristiano Ronaldo, qui continue de faire parler. Face à la polémique, Cristiano Ronaldo a publié un message fort sur son compte Instagram.

Oh My Goal revient aussi sur l’échange très étrange entre Martial et Mbappé lors d’un changement.

Enfin, Oh My Goal revient sur la performance de Zlatan Ibrahimovic et sa prédiction juste avant le match.

#CristianoRonaldo #Mbappé #Zlatan

---------------------------------------

Zélie monte sur la scène de The Voice 2021 pour interpréter le titre Mr / Mme de Loïc Nottet. Parviendra-t-elle à faire se retourner les coachs Amel Bent, Vianney, Marc Lavoine et Florent Pagny ?

🎤 Découvrez toujours plus de contenus inédits : http://bit.ly/ineditsthevoice

🎤  Abonnez-vous à la chaîne : http://bit.ly/1OdKCbY

🎤  Revoir toutes les performances de la saison 10 : http://bit.ly/thevoiceFR10

The Voice : La Plus Belle Voix est une émission de télévision française de télé-crochet musical diffusée sur TF1. Des chanteurs expérimentés ou novices tentent de séduire le public et les 4 coachs, Amel Bent, Vianney, Florent Pagny et Marc Lavoine lors d’auditions à l’aveugle, de battle et de primes. Présentée par Nikos Aliagas et Karine Ferri, The Voice 2021 est diffusée à partir du 6 février 2021

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Grey's Anatomy 17x10 Promo "Breathe" (HD) Season 17 Episode 10 Promo ft. Chyler Leigh
snippet.description:
Grey's Anatomy 17x10 "Breathe" Promo with guest star Chyler Leigh - The hospital ventilator shortage has the doctors gravely concerned when both a mother and daughter are in critical condition with COVID and fighting over the last ventilator. Meanwhile, Hayes’ high-risk sister-in-law with multiple sclerosis ends up in the hospital with a kidney stone, and the sister house has a few more kids join it as Amelia plays babysitter for the day on “Grey’s Anatomy,” Thursday, April 1st, on ABC. snippet.title: Star Wars: The Bad Batch | Official Trailer | Disney+
snippet.description:
Check out the brand-new trailer for Lucasfilm’s “Star Wars: The Bad Batch,” an original animated series launching exclusively on Disney+. “Star Wars: The Bad Batch” makes its debut on Tuesday, May 4, with a special 70-minute premiere, followed by new episodes every Friday starting on May 7. 

 

“Star Wars: The Bad Batch” follows the elite and experimental clones of the Bad Batch (first introduced in “The Clone Wars”) as they find their way in a rapidly changing galaxy in the immediate aftermath of the Clone War. Members of Bad Batch—a unique squad of clones who vary genetically from their brothers in the Clone Army—each possess a singular exceptional skill that makes them extraordinarily effective soldiers and a formidable crew.

 

“Star Wars: The Bad Batch” is executive produced by Dave Filoni (“The Mandalorian,” “Star Wars: The Clone Wars”), Athena Portillo (“Star Wars: The Clone Wars,” “Star Wars Rebels”), Brad Rau (“Star Wars Rebels,” “Star Wars Resistance”) and Jennifer Corbett (“Star Wars Resistance,” “NCIS”) with Carrie Beck (“The Mandalorian,” “Star Wars Rebels”) as co-executive producer and Josh Rimes as producer (“Star Wars Resistance”). Rau is also serving as supervising director with Corbett as head writer.    

 

Visit StarWars.com for more exciting news on the series.

snippet.title: Highlights Turkije - Nederland (24/03/2021) WK-kwalificatie
snippet.description:
Samenvatting van de eerste WK-kwalificatiewedstrijd van Oranje, in en tegen Turkije.

Bij OnsOranje blijf je de hoogte van alle Nederlandse elftallen.

OnsOranje is het officiële fan platform voor het Nederlands elftal. Je vindt hier alles over de vertegenwoordigende teams, van het Nederlands elftal (mannen en vrouwen) tot de jeugdteams, van het veld tot in de zaal. Hier zie je samenvattingen en highlights, interviews en unieke beelden achter de schermen. Kortom; alles om de beleving van ons Oranje dichter bij jou te brengen.
Abonneer je op het YouTube kanaal van Oranje!

snippet.title: Kosso & Dorentina | Wintersessie 2021 | 101Barz
snippet.description:
Kosso & Dorentina kwamen vorig jaar als eerste koppel de 101Barz studio blessen en hadden de best bekeken sessie van 2020. Vandaag zijn ze weer bij Rotjoch in de booth om het nog eens dunnetjes over te doen. Lees verder op: https://www.bnnvara.nl/101barz/artikelen/kosso-dorentina-pakken-door

#KOSSO #DORENTINA #WINTERSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

Volg ons ook op:
🔴 Website: https://101barz.nl
🌐 Twitter: https://twitter.com/101barz 
🔵 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/101BarzOfficieel
🟤 Instagram: https://instagram.com/101barznl

Wil jij de redactie iets mailen? Stuur het naar info@101Barz.nl

101Barz is een online platform van BNNVARA, onderdeel van de Nederlandse Publieke Omroep.

localized.description:
Beyoncé (Maya Rudolph) has a hard time being interviewed by Sean Evans (Mikey Day) after eating an extremely hot wing.

snippet.title: Daniel Cormier reacts to Francis Ngannou's KO of Stipe Miocic at UFC 260 | SportsCenter
snippet.description:
Former UFC heavyweight champion Daniel Cormier joins SportsCenter to discuss Francis Ngannou's title-winning knockout of Stipe Miocic at UFC 260. DC talks about how good Ngannou looked and what a potential matchup with Jon Jones would look like later in 2021.
 
#UFC260 #UFC #Ngannou

قناة كليك كوك قناة تقدم وصفات ناجحة ، مغربية ،عالمية بطريقة مبسطة  و واضحة 
La chaîne de cuisine Clic cook  vous propose des recettes marocaines et 
mondiales, faciles et inratables présentées par Mariam Barakat.

Cooking channel Clic Cook presentend by Mariam Barakat.

لمزيد من الوصفات زوروا صفحتي على الفايسبوك . وك خاصة بالطبخ المغربي و العالمي من تقديم مريم بركات تقدم لكم وصفات متنوعة  
و مجموعتي على الفايسبوك.
https://www.facebook.com/groups/841489129233709/members/

حلويات مغربية سهلة التحضير واقتصادية,
حلويات مغربية 2016
جديييييد كيك بدون دقيق بطريقة مختلفة و مبتكرة /cake oreo/ 
https://youtu.be/lXOs8BC1Vl4

اسرار كرص او القراشل رطب و خفيف اكثر من القطن روووووعة/brioche marocaine 
https://youtu.be/jJ9sids2WfQ

اكتشفوا اسرااااار اشهر الاطباق المغربية الخاصة بالمناسبات من يد طباخة محترفة (حلقة 3)
https://youtu.be/J9NTKOC3Unc

اكتشفوا طريقة السفة الخاصة بالمناسبات مع الطباخة المحترفة السعدية العلوي(حلقة 12)
https://youtu.be/GjXUtgkDpWQ


سلسلة جدييييدة تنفرد بها قناتي لكشف اسرااااار اشهر الاطباق المغربية الخاصة بالمناسبات 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k1uLKItb3oA

اكتشفوا اسرااااار اشهر الاطباق المغربية الخاصة بالمناسبات من يد طباخة محترفة (حلقة 3)
https://youtu.be/J9NTKOC3Unc

اكتشفوا ملوي و مسمن ديال الزنقة من يد محترفين مقادير و اسرار لاول مرة على YOUTUBE جزء 4

snippet.title: Highlights Gibraltar - Nederland (30/03/2021) WK-kwalificatie
snippet.description:
Samenvatting van de derde WK-kwalificatiewedstrijd van Oranje, uit tegen Gibraltar. 

Bij OnsOranje blijf je de hoogte van alle Nederlandse elftallen

OnsOranje is het officiële fan platform voor het Nederlands elftal. Je vindt hier alles over de vertegenwoordigende teams, van het Nederlands elftal (mannen en vrouwen) tot de jeugdteams, van het veld tot in de zaal. Hier zie je samenvattingen en highlights, interviews en unieke beelden achter de schermen. Kortom; alles om de beleving van ons Oranje dichter bij jou te brengen.
Abonneer je op het YouTube kanaal van Oranje!
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpnmJcBhJqKIHFkKvgdkdMQ?sub_confirmation=1

Volg OnsOranje

...op Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/onsoranje
...op Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/onsoranje

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: La face sombre de la résistance française : l'épuration
snippet.description:
Si la Libération de la France durant la Seconde Guerre mondiale est considérée comme l’une des grandes pages de l’histoire de notre pays, elle a aussi, vous ne l’ignorez pas, son côté sombre. Et celui-ci porte un nom : l’épuration. Pour mieux comprendre, on va revenir en 1944.

Cet épisode est sponsorisé par les éditions 10*18 et la sortie de son roman : “La sacrifiée du Vercors” : https://bit.ly/3e1PRAs

📝 Écrit par Benjamin Brillaud et Julien Hervieux
🎞 Montage par Dead Will : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtLkNuzB2_j2z7SFdvkiCww

➤➤➤ Sources en fin de description

————————————————————————————————————————————

➜ "Les pires batailles de l'Histoire", Livre aux éditions Tallandier : https://tidd.ly/2TzMtS5
➜ Nota Bene, Tome 1 "Petites histoires grands destins" (BD aux éditions Soleil) : https://tidd.ly/2HDpnaq
➜ Nota Bene, Tome 2 "A la rescousse de l'Histoire" (BD aux éditions Soleil) : https://tidd.ly/37PmvCc
➜ Nota Bene, Tome 3 "La mythologie Nordique" (BD aux éditions Soleil) :  
https://tidd.ly/2TwVqvp

***MULTIMEDIA***

- La Grande Histoire de France après l'occupation, d'Henri Amouroux,.
- L'Épuration des intellectuels, de Pierre Assouline
- https://www.franceculture.fr/histoire/non-lepuration-na-pas-ete-sauvage-apres-la-seconde-guerre-mondiale
- Le Centre Régional Résistance et Liberté, qui a l'avantage de donner des exemples en province. : https://www.crrl.fr/index.html
- Les Françaises, les Français et l'Épuration: De 1940 à nos jours, de Fabrice Virgile https://www.amazon.fr/dp/2070445224/ref=cm_sw_r_cp_api_i_7YA037RVWZ700XCHMRBZ

snippet.title: Lost Frequencies - Rise (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Here's my first release on Sony Music! So happy with my new track ‘Rise’, hope you guys are too!

Stream 'Rise' now on all dsp's: https://lostfrequencies.lnk.to/Rise  
 
‘Rise’ cultivates itself as an instantly-known ‘Lost Frequencies’ track, thanks to an emotive vocal and stripped-back rhythms. From toplines that come with a message of relation with “It’s been a hard year”, it soon explodes with a light-at-the-end-of-the-tunnel positivity. As “Gonna make my way right through the clouds / I rise” motions to the feel-good ethos we need right now!! Let me know what you think in the comments below! 

#LostFrequencies #Rise #SonyDebut 

Follow Lost Frequencies: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lostfrequencies/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LostFrequenciesMusic/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/lfrequencies
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lostfrequencies

CREDITS
Agency: Wolfstreet @wolfstreetagency
 
Creative direction & graphics: Celis Jansen & Joeri Worm @wearemoire 
 
Director: Tommie Geraedts @tommiegeraedts 
Producer: Allen Grygierczyk @allengrygierczyk 
Production manager: Tess Wijker @tesswijker 
Production assistant: Danae van Hoof @danaevanhoof 
 
1st A.D.:Farah Abdi @abdifilms 
D.o.P.: Thomas van Krugten @thomasvankrugten 
1st A.C.: Casper Fraij @casperfraij 
Gaffer: Jeroen Zwart @jeroenzwart 
Licht assistent: Ayke Govaart @ayke_govaart 
Licht assistent: Nina Kleinstra @ninakleinstra 
Grip: Roy van den Vlekkert 
DIT: Erik Wiedenhof 
Health and safety officer: Brechtje Nieuwint 
 
Make up: Danielle Grisel @daniellegrisel 
Styling: Babette Tielrooij @babette.tielrooij 
Choreographer: Emma Evelein @emmaevelein 
VFX Supervisor: Nick Marlow @nickmarhigh 
 
Editor: Sam van der Poel @sampoeli 
Colorist: Thijs Kern @thijskern 
Online: Damiaan Dracht @damieyaan
 
VFX: Tommie Geraedts @tommiegeraedts
Damiaan Dracht @damieyaan 
Bart van Brussel
Nick Marlow @nickmarhigh
Giovanni Locantore @igiowa

Lyrics: 
its been a hard year 
feeling the weight now 
all of the hurt, all of the dirt 
all of the shame now 
nothing but closed doors, 
not gonna break down 
i rise 
see doubt is a strong drug 
it gets in your bloodstream 
you loose your hope, you loose your soul 
you the whole  thing 
i fought my whole life 
to know it won’t break me  
i rise  

if i had an answer to all my fears, i’d be doing well 
if  i had a dollar for every tear i’d be rich as hell 
call me crazy 
the struggle made me 
   
ain’t no way no way i’m stopping now 
gonna make my way right through the clouds 
i rise 
i rise 
imma grit my teeth and bare the pain 
gonna climb this mountain once again 
i rise 
i rise 
  
im feeling stronger 
stronger than ive been 
weather the storm, weathered the rain 
i am the lightning  
dont need a shelter 
Im done with the hiding 
i rise 
 
if i had an answer to all my fears, i’d be doing well 
if  i had a dollar for every tear i’d be rich as hell 
call me crazy 
the struggle made me

snippet.title: SCRUB: Starship SN11 flight test scrubbed, but earlier static fire looked good
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN11 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible in the afternoon local time on Friday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

This original content is copyrighted to NASASpaceflight (NASASpaceflight.com) and is not to be reused in any form without explicit permission.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maroon5​

Sign up for updates: http://smarturl.it/Maroon5.News​

LYRICS
 
It’s beautiful it’s bittersweet
You’re like a broken home to me
I take a shot of memories and black out like an empty street
I fill my days with the way you walk
And fill my nights with broken dreams
I make up lies inside my head
Like one day you’ll come back to me

Now I’m not holding on
Not holding on
Not holding on
I’m just depressed that you’re gone
Not holding on 
Not holding on

Lucid, Prove it
If you made a promise, then keep it
Why you wanna lie and then get mad, I don’t believe it
But really I was just doing fine without ya 
Looking fine, sippin’ wine, dancing on club couches  
Baby why you wanna lose me like you don’t need me
Like I don’t block you and you still try to reach me
How you figure out how to call from me from the TV
You runnin’ out of chances and this time I mean it (yeah)

Bet you miss my love, all in your bed
Now ya stressin’ out, pulling your hair
Smelling your pillows and wishin I was there

I know its hard to let go, I’m the best

For more, visit: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maroon5​
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maroon5​
Twitter: https://twitter.com/maroon5​
Sign up for updates: http://smarturl.it/Maroon5.News​

LYRICS
 
It’s beautiful it’s bittersweet
You’re like a broken home to me
I take a shot of memories and black out like an empty street
I fill my days with the way you walk
And fill my nights with broken dreams
I make up lies inside my head
Like one day you’ll come back to me

Now I’m not holding on
Not holding on
Not holding on
I’m just depressed that you’re gone
Not holding on 
Not holding on

Beautiful mistakes 
I make inside my head
She’s naked in my bed
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes
I wouldn’t take em back
I’m in love with the past
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

Nah nah nah
In my head
Nah nah nah 
In my bed
Nah nah nah
Making beautiful mistakes 

It’s pitiful
I can’t believe how everyday gets worse for me 
I take a break, I cut you off
To keep myself from looking soft
I fill my nights with the way you was
And still wake up with broken dreams
I make these lies inside my head
Feel like they’re my reality 

Now I’m not holding on
Not holding on
Not holding on
I’m just depressed that you’re gone
Not holding on 
Not holding on

And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes
I wouldn’t take em back
I’m in love with the past
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

Nah nah nah
In my head
Nah nah nah 
In my bed
Nah nah nah
Making beautiful mistakes

You did me wrong cause I let you
Usually I like my situations beneficial
Doing something different
Got me looking stupid
The only way I’m coming back to you, is if you dream it
Lucid, Prove it
If you made a promise, then keep it
Why you wanna lie and then get mad, I don’t believe it
But really I was just doing fine without ya 
Looking fine, sippin’ wine, dancing on club couches  
Baby why you wanna lose me like you don’t need me
Like I don’t block you and you still try to reach me
How you figure out how to call from me from the TV
You runnin’ out of chances and this time I mean it (yeah)

Bet you miss my love, all in your bed
Now ya stressin’ out, pulling your hair
Smelling your pillows and wishin I was there 
Sliding down to shower wall looking sad
I know its hard to let go, I’m the best
Best you ever had and best you gonna get
If we break up I don’t wanna be friends, you’re toxic

Beautiful mistakes 
I make inside my head
She’s naked in my bed
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes
I wouldn’t take em back
I’m in love with the past
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

In my bed

Making beautiful mistakes

Making beautiful mistakes

snippet.title: Çukur 4.Sezon 30.Bölüm
snippet.description:
Bu dizi ve çok daha fazlası puhutv'de → https://puhutv.com/cukur-detay?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=cukur&utm_content=detay

Çukur'a Abone Olmak İçin → https://bit.ly/cukur-dd-sub

4.Sezon 30. Bölüm Özet:

Yamaç ve Vartolu arasındaki gerilim herkesi etkileyecek. Amca, Yamaç’a yardım eden muhbiri bulmak için kuracağı oyunla şüphelendiklerinden birini tuzağa düşürecek. Yamaç, eski bir düşmanının hayatta olduğunu öğrenip peşine düşerken Amca, Bilal’le hesabını kapatmak için yeni bir operasyon düzenleyecek. Amca’ya verdiği sözü yerine getirmek için operasyonun başına geçen Vartolu hiç beklemediği bir sürprizle karşılaşırken, aksiyon sahneleri nefesleri kesecek.


Yönetmen: Sinan Öztürk
Senaryo: Gökhan Horzum, Damla Serim
Yapımcı: Kerem Çatay
İdari Yapımcı: Yamaç Okur
Müzik: Toygar Işıklı
2. Yönetmen: Barbaros Bilgin
Görüntü Yönetmeni: Tolga Kutluay
Sanat Yönetmeni: Oya Köseoğlu

OYUNCULAR
Yamaç: Aras Bulut İynemli
Sultan: Perihan Savaş
Cumali Amca: Müfit Kayacan
Vartolu: Erkan Kolçak Köstendil
Aliço: Rıza Kocaoğlu
Cumali: Necip Memili
Efsun: Damla Sönmez
Celasun: Kubilay Aka
Akın: Burak Dakak
Damla: Hare Sürel

Seher: Begüm Akkaya
Yasmin: Gamze Doğanoğlu

snippet.title: Dunia Batma - El Hennana 2021 | دنيا بطمة - الحنانة
snippet.description:
كلمات : محمد أمير 
ألحان : مهدي غولام 
توزيع : بدر مخلوقي 
جيتار : ياسين بنفضول 
اخراج : محمد الترك  

كلمات الأغنية 🎶

الجنَّة تحت أقدامك يا مَّا 
ربي منك ميحرمنيش 
وصاني ربي عليك يا يمَّا 
تجي فيا و فيك متجيش 

سهرتي و شحال قاسيتي 
ربيتينا رجال وسط ناس 
تخبيها فقلبك لا بكيتي 
تصبري و تقولي لاباس 

غنشوف الدنيا غمامة 
ويلا رحتي وايا يمَّا 
ندعي ربي يديني 
قبل ما يديك وايا يمَّا 

و الدنيا واش تسوا يامَّا 
ويلا مشيتي كي غادي نعيش 
حرمتني ليام من بويا 
و انا صغيرة محسيتش 

عوضتي غيابو ما بينتيش 
شي نهار ضعفك حسيناه 
و شكون يعوضني 
و حنانك فين غنلقاه 

غنشوف الدنيا غمامة 
ويلا رحتي وايا يمَّا 
ندعي ربي يديني 
قبل ما يديك وايا يمَّا


#duniaBatma
#الحنانة
#دنيا_بطمة
___________
Instagram: http://bit.ly/3cP545M
Youtube: http://bit.ly/3f22oUY

snippet.title: Het Molletje: Ben Weyts wil vaccins stelen
snippet.description: Ben Weyts voert de druk op om leerkrachten prioritair te vaccineren. “Te moeilijk? Dan zal ik het zelf wel regelen” zei hij daarover. Maar aan vaccins geraken blijkt toch moeilijker dan gedacht.

snippet.title: A chair made for needy pets
snippet.description:
My dog would really prefer it if I turned myself into a dog bed. Since I'm not too keen on that project, I built her a chair instead. Thanks KiwiCo for sponsoring this video: https://kiwico.com/simone50 Check out their kits if you know a kiddo that likes building things. 

Also, thanks to all of you who have made Scraps fan art. It fills a dog owner's heart like nothing else. The pieces that I hung on the chair were by: 
https://instagram.com/loni.art
https://instagram.com/sisselonpaper
https://twitter.com/W3LTERW8

snippet.title: La guerre en Ukraine
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Giant Suez Canal ship freed | DW News
snippet.description:
The Ever Given has been freed. The container ship was blocking the Suez Canal for nearly a week, holding up billions in trade. Workers succesfully freed the MV Ever Given, according to the Suez Canal Authority and service provider Leth Agencies. The vessel, which is the size of the Empire State Building in New York, had held up nearly 200 other ships, bringing the world's most important trade route to a grinding halt.

snippet.title: Hercai 65. Bölüm
snippet.description:
65. Bölüm Özeti 🦋
Doktorun son anda verdiği haberle bir mucizenin kapılarını aralayan Reyyan ve Miran tedavi için İstanbul’a giderler. Küçük kızlarını Hazar’a emanet edip onlarla birlikte İstanbul’a giden Zehra’nın yanı sıra, Fırat ve Zeynep’te yanlarındadır. Bu sırada Reyyan’ı hasta edenin Füsun olduğunu öğrenen Hazar’da hesap sormak üzere soluğu Aslanbey konağında alır. Son anda yetişen Azize oğlunu durdurmaya çalışır. İkisinin bunca yaşananın ardından ana oğul olmaya başladığını gören Füsun’u derin bir nefret duygusu sarmıştır.

Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için bu kanala katılın:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join 

“İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi”

Yapımcılığını, Mia Yapım Banu Akdeniz üstlendiği, "İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi" mottosuyla yola çıkan Hercai'nin başrollerini Akın Akınözü, Ebru Şahin, Gülçin Santıroğlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Özer, Oya Unustası, Tansu Taşanlar ve  İlay Erkök paylaşıyor.

Hercai YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://bit.ly/2vwmORD

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQ

snippet.title: Les 10 Essentiels d’ICO & Just Riadh (grillz, Mercedes et Pass Navigo ) | GQ
snippet.description:
ICO & Just Riadh ont présenté à GQ France les dix objets et accessoires dont ils ne se séparent jamais. Le récap’ : un iPhone, des grillz, des AirPods Pro, un diplôme d’économie de la Solvay Brussels School Economics & Management, des Freedent White, le meilleur pote d’ICO, un Pass Navigo, les clés de la Mercedes d’ICO, un chargeur rapide Apple, et enfin, des lunettes de soleil. ICO est un rappeur venu tout droit de Belgique, de Bruxelles, précisément. Il s’est fait remarquer sur SoundCloud avec des morceaux remplis d’humour aux flows parfaitement maîtrisés. ICO, qui est aussi beatmaker à ses heures perdues, est un acharné et est parvenu à se forger une communauté autour de lui. Son premier disque, « Petit con », paru fin 2019, a d’ailleurs été très bien accueilli. Il est de retour en ce début d’année 2021 avec deux extraits « BBJTM » et « Dis pardon », le tout pour faire patienter son public pendant qu’il concocte son prochain projet. Just Riadh, quant à lui, est un influenceur à succès. Ses contenus, basés sur l’humour, lui permettent de dégotter des partenariats avec de multiples marques. Les deux acolytes se sont amusés à collaborer sur un morceau : « Rebeu fragile » et ont dévoilé leur deuxième collaboration, « Señorita ». Petit conseil GQ pour découvrir ICO : écoutez le morceau « L’album ». 

S'ABONNER :
https://www.youtube.com/user/GQmagazinefr?sub_confirmation=1

#icoetjustriadh #10essentiels #gqfrance
--

• Punchlines

• Presque en couv' 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=btEPxVyLaKQ&list=PLQIl_66dkrZRFl1udidEzehPKmIS1CnIM

• Don't Touch my... 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nmKUIA6sbq8&list=PLQIl_66dkrZTduWMhZFuwxTG_9mtSJo5I

• 24H avec... 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rry_oF2215c&list=PLQIl_66dkrZQBLtvBApJ_SyIpkchJlxMJ

--

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: Pourquoi dort-on ? Le mystère scientifique du sommeil
snippet.description:
A quoi sert vraiment le sommeil ? Eh bien on ne le sait pas précisément ! Il existe plusieurs hypothèses, mais aucune ne fait totalement consensus chez les scientifiques.

snippet.title: Chris Harris on... Tesla Model S 'Plaid': 0-60 in under 2 seconds | Top Gear
snippet.description:
Chris Harris joins Top Gear Magazine Editor Jack Rix to discuss the new Tesla Model S 'Plaid' - a revision of the Model S with 1100bhp, a 0-60 time under two seconds, and a steering wheel suspiciously devoid of its roundness. So, what do you think of the 'Plaid'? Let us know in the comments.

Also, if you're in the UK, don't miss the new series of Top Gear, available on iPlayer right now: http://bit.ly/TG-S30

P.S. It was quite chilly in the hanger that day, hence why the boys are wrapped up.

Subscribe to Top Gear for more videos: http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTopGear

WATCH MORE TOP GEAR:
Top Gear Series 30: http://bit.ly/TG-S30
Geneva Online Motor Show: http://bit.ly/TGGMS20​
First Look: http://bit.ly/TG-FirstLook

MORE ABOUT TOP GEAR:
Want to watch a bit of Top Gear on the internet? Welcome to the most comprehensive collection of official clips you'll find on YouTube. Whether you're searching for a caravan challenge, Ken Block in the Hoonicorn, cars versus fighter jets, Stig power laps or the latest Chris Harris Drives, you can find all the iconic films here.

Want to share your views with the team? Join our BBC Studios Voice: https://www.bbcstudiosvoice.com/register

This is a commercial channel from BBC Studios.
